author: Marie-Laure Thuret
subject: v4.1.3
body: ## [4.1.3](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.1.2...v4.1.3) (2017-10-09) ### Bug Fixes * **List:** remove React16 warning ([algolia/react-instantsearch#442](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/442)) ([2956f07](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/2956f07)) ### Features * **connectStateResults:** add component props ([algolia/react-instantsearch#434](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/434)) ([83e515d](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/83e515d))
